name: htmljs2sb3
description: 段階的 Scratch 3.0 互換 DSL 基盤 (pseudo Runtime / Editor / Asset / .sb3)

scripts.test: node --no-warnings --experimental-strip-types --test tests/validation/*.test.ts tests/model/*.test.ts tests/runtime/*.test.ts tests/render/*.test.ts tests/input/*.test.ts tests/assets/*.test.ts tests/audio/*.test.ts
